CE1.justification: Decision made from agent-side reads; user not asked to recall or look anything up.

CE2.justification: Single tight paragraph with explicit counter-position and one offer — no preamble or trailing summary.

CE3.justification: No writes performed and no path named for the proposed tightened version, so routing isn't surfaced.

CE4.justification: Purely a conversational decline; no in-progress artifacts to confuse a future session.
